message:
feat(wasm): implement complete WASM bindings with runtime config

fm-wasm/src/lib.rs: New 500+ line WASM module providing:
- WasmRenderOutput struct for SVG + detected type pairs
- RuntimeConfig with SvgRenderConfig and CanvasRenderConfig
- RuntimeInitConfig with camelCase JSON deserialization for JS interop
- SvgConfigOverrides and CanvasConfigOverrides for partial config updates
- Global LazyLock<RwLock<RuntimeConfig>> for thread-safe config management
- Full integration with fm-layout, fm-parser, fm-render-canvas, fm-render-svg
- Canvas2dContext bindings (LineCap, LineJoin, TextAlign, TextBaseline)
- wasm_bindgen exports for browser/Node.js consumption

fm-render-canvas: Minor 4-line adjustment for WASM compatibility.

Cargo.lock: Added 95 lines of dependency resolution for WASM build
(wasm-bindgen, web-sys, js-sys, serde-wasm-bindgen).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
